title.en: At this moment, the meaning ~ ambition of the a...

content.en:
Because the supreme forces moved too fast, there was no warning at all, and the peak demon seeds of the demon seed abyss did not have the slightest expectation.

Rumble!!!!

With the invasion of a large number of peak realm gods, an area of the demon seed abyss was directly shattered, and countless demon seeds fell and died.

At this moment, the meaning ~ ambition of the abyss of the demon seed came.

At this moment, it seems that the heavens and the earth are filled with the will of the demon seed abyss.

Ye Tian once faced the will of the Demon Seed Abyss, he once tried to copy a Demon Seed, but the result was the Demon Seed Abyss-Will.

At that time, he knew how terrifying the Demon Seed Abyss Will was, and if he really fought with the Demon Seed Abyss Will, the Demon Seed Abyss could wipe him out with a single thought.

Now.

The Demon Seed Abyss Will is suppressing this group of peak realm gods.

Ye Tian felt that his strength had been suppressed by at least thirty percent, and in this case, it was naturally difficult for these peak realm gods to defeat that group of peak demon seeds.

However, the gods of the Liangyi Realm made a move and directly sacrificed the forbidden zero beads.

Airplanes!!!!

The Forbidden Zero Bead instantly erupted with infinite white light.

"The will of the demon seed abyss, just waiting for you, if you hide it, it will be difficult for me to ban you!"

The god of the Liangyi Realm sneered.

In an instant, the will of the Demon Seed Abyss was sealed by the Forbidden Zero Bead, and the will of the Demon Seed Abyss that covered here endlessly retracted in an instant, and the Forbidden Zero Bead also entered the origin of the Demon Seed Abyss, continuously compressing the will of the Demon Seed Abyss and completely sealing it.

Of course, this ban can't last forever, but there's no problem holding on until the end of the war.

At the moment when the will of the Demon Seed Abyss was sealed, many peak realm gods felt that their strength had recovered and they were no longer suppressed.

At this time.

Many demon seeds came from all directions, but this group of demon seeds were very weak, at most they were only high-level demon seeds, and in the eyes of the peak realm gods, this group of demon seeds were just ants.

Airplanes!!!!

With a wave of his hand, a peak realm god swept away, and the terrifying extra-dimensional power swept away, directly crushing this group of demon species.

Even if it is a high-level peak demon seed, it is just an ant in the hands of such a peak realm god.

It can be said that at this moment, the demon seeds in this area are unlucky, and they have no ability to resist.

But soon, the pinnacle demons came.

The peak demon seeds of the demon seed abyss arrived, and the terrifying demon seed aura filled the surroundings.

One by one, the pinnacle demon seed descended, one by one holding weapons, many of which were super dimensional secret treasures.

"Kill!"

The peak demon seeds didn't ask the gods of the Liangyi Realm why they invaded the demon seed abyss, everyone was not stupid, there was only one reason for the invasion, and that was to seek extradimensional resources.

However, they were also not afraid of the pinnacle realm gods of the supreme power.

In terms of strength, their Demon Seed Abyss is not bad, even without the assistance of the Demon Seed Abyss Will, they are still sure to resist the supreme forces.

"Liangyi Realm God, if there is any big killing weapon, use it quickly!"

One by one, the peak realm gods urged.

If the big killing weapon is not used, once they really fight, their side may fall to the peak realm god at any time!

They're here to invade the Demon Abyss, but they don't want to fall.

"Don't worry, hold on for a while. "

The god of the Liangyi Realm said.

When the other peak realm gods heard this, they were speechless for a moment, but they had already invaded, and it was too late to retreat now.

"Kill!"

They had no choice but to fight with these peak demon seeds.

......

Ye Tian didn't show all his strength, he only exerted his strength comparable to that of the god of Yonghao Realm, and the super dimensional secret treasure on his body was only used a small part, not all of it.

Otherwise, he sacrificed so many super dimensional secret treasures at once, and he seriously doubted that the gods of the Liangyi Realm would turn to deal with him, after all, if he killed him, he could obtain a large number of super dimensional secret treasures, which was equivalent to how many Galan Treasure coins!

Anyone will be tempted, this is more cost-effective than dealing with the abyss of demon seeds!

So, he's been paddling.

The Peak Realm God and the Peak Demon Seed were killed, and there was no fall of the Peak Realm God at the beginning, after all, the strong against the strong, the weak against the weak, and when the difference in strength was not large, it was really not easy to cause the Peak Realm God and the Peak Demon Seed to fall.

But not long after, a peak demon seed was killed, and immediately after, a peak realm god was attacked by a powerful peak demon seed, and was instantly killed by the power of the extra-dimensional.

After that, one after another peak realm gods and peak demon seeds fell one after another.

At this time, both sides were red-eyed, and neither could retreat, both attracted by anger and greed.

Moreover, once a Peak Realm God or Peak Demon Seed falls, the wealth on his body will also go to other Peak Realm Gods and Peak Demon Species, which will lead to more intense killings.

"Liangyi Realm God, do you have a big killing weapon??"

A battered pinnacle realm god roared angrily.

"Hold on a little longer!"

The Liangyi Realm God was fighting against one of the top peak demon species, and he didn't say anything, just let the other peak realm gods hold on for a while longer.

Soon after, some more Peak Realm Gods and Peak Demon Seeds fell.

At this time, the Taiyi Realm God said: "The God of the Liangyi Realm, you can sacrifice that big killing weapon!"

"Good!"

After the god of the Liangyi Realm struck away the peak demon seed who was fighting with him, his heart moved, and he sacrificed a blood-colored puppet.

After the appearance of the blood-colored puppet, a strange scene appeared. []

I saw that it quickly absorbed the corpses of a peak realm god and a peak demon seed, and absorbed these corpses into the puppet's body.

Immediately after, the aura of the blood-colored puppet became more and more terrifying.

"Destroy it!"

The peak demon seeds realized that something was wrong with this blood-colored puppet, and they had a sense of death crisis one by one, so they killed this blood-colored puppet one after another.

"Stop them!"

The gods of the Liangyi Realm and the gods of the Taiyi Realm intercepted these peak demon seeds and prevented these peak demon seeds from destroying the blood puppets.

However, under the desperate efforts of the peak demon species, there are still peak demon species that break through the blockade and approach the blood-colored puppet.

A scene that can surprise the peak demon seed happened, the peak demon seed's full force blow, and the use of the super dimensional secret treasure, when it was about to attack the blood puppet, a layer of blood light appeared on the blood puppet's body, and easily resisted the full force of the peak demon seed.

Bang bang bang!!!

Under the attack again and again, the peak demon seed was unable to break through the defense of the blood-colored puppet at all.

Soon, the blood-colored puppets finally completely digested the corpses of those peak realm gods and peak demon seeds, and completed the final transformation.

Rumble!!!!!

A terrifying blood-colored light spread, and then the blood-colored puppet continued to change, and finally turned into a blood-colored figure.

Immediately after, the blood-colored figure grabbed the peak demon seed and swallowed it in one gulp, killing it instantly.

Seeing this scene, even those peak realm gods were stunned.

What the hell, it's so terrifying!.
